sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the grid looks the same. The yellow U-shapes are in the same positions. The buttons are the same. The blue blob is the same. The only change might be the timer bar.
Let me check what changed by comparing the before and after frames.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
before_nodes = before['nodes']
after_nodes = after['nodes']
print("Before: %d nodes, After: %d nodes" % (len(before_nodes), len(after_nodes)))
for i in range(min(len(before_nodes), len(after_nodes))):
    bn = before_nodes[i]
    an = after_nodes[i]
    if bn['color'] != an['color'] or bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
        print("Node %d: color %s->%s, pixels %d->%d" % (i, bn['color'], an['color'], bn['pixels'], an['pixels']))
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
